title: Rust on a Conveyor Belt

analysis.object: T595: Rust on a Conveyor Belt depth analysis

surface_oxidation.description: Surface oxidation: EML-1 exponential pit initiation
surface_oxidation.reason: Corrosion initiation is EML-1: exponential increase in pit density with time

pit_depth_eml2.description: Pit depth measurement: logarithmic corrosion rate; EML-2
pit_depth_eml2.reason: Corrosion rate is EML-2: log-linear pit growth after initiation; standard inspection metric

fatigue_eml3.description: Fatigue cracking from oscillatory conveyor load: EML-3
fatigue_eml3.reason: Belt fatigue is EML-3: oscillatory tensile stress from cyclic loading creates crack propagation

belt_failure_emlinf.description: Catastrophic belt failure: EML-inf; unpredictable final break
belt_failure_emlinf.reason: Belt failure is EML-inf: sudden categorification from EML-3 crack propagation to total rupture

replacement_decision.description: Replacement decision: EML-2 measurement (or EML-3 oscillation between safe/unsafe)
replacement_decision.reason: Professional judgment: EML-2 measurement of pit depth and fatigue crack length vs safety threshold

analysis.theorem: T595: Rust on a Conveyor Belt (S874).

key_theorem: T595: Rust on a Conveyor Belt (S874).
